name: Neal Froneman
background: Neal Froneman was appointed executive director and CEO of Sibanye-Stillwater on 1 January 2013. He has over 40 years of experience in the mining industry. Prior to joining Sibanye-Stillwater, he was CEO of Gold One International Limited and Aflease Gold Limited.

company_affiliations.name: Sibanye Stillwater Limited
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Chief Executive Officer and Executive Director
